scenario.send:
INVITE [$remoteContact] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[$localTransport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: [$localHdr] To: [$remoteHdrInitInv] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [$localCseq] INVITE Contact: [$localContact] Supported: 100rel Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test Allow: INVITE,ACK,BYE,CANCEL,SUBSCRIBE,NOTIFY,MESSAGE,REFER,INFO,PRACK,PUBLISH,UPDATE Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 [$sdpVer] IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port+0] RTP/SAVP 0 8 101 c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=sendrecv a=rtcp-mux a=avaya-media-connectivity-check-supported a=crypto:1 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:k8FuMlkO/O4uy4OnGiN5VIC3lxcc5MlmjuAcY0a7 UNENCRYPTED_SRTCP

recv.action: <ereg regexp="<([^>]*)" search_in="hdr" start_line="true" header="Contact:" assign_to="tempRemoteContact"/> <ereg regexp="[^<].*" search_in="var" variable="tempRemoteContact" assign_to="remoteContact" check_it="true" />

<ereg regexp="<([^>]*)" search_in="hdr" start_line="true" header="Contact:" assign_to="tempRemoteContact"/> <ereg regexp="[^<].*" search_in="var" variable="tempRemoteContact" assign_to="remoteContact" check_it="true" />

scenario.send: ACK [$remoteContact] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[$localTransport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: [$localHdr] To:[$remoteHdr] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 ACK Contact: [$localContact] [routes] Max-Forwards: 70 Allow: INVITE,ACK,BYE,CANCEL,SUBSCRIBE,NOTIFY,MESSAGE,REFER,INFO,PRACK,PUBLISH,UPDATE Subject: Performance Test Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]

INVITE [$remoteContact] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[$localTransport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: [$localHdr] To:[$remoteHdr] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [$localCseq] INVITE Contact: [$localContact] Supported: 100rel [routes] Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test Allow: INVITE,ACK,BYE,CANCEL,SUBSCRIBE,NOTIFY,MESSAGE,REFER,INFO,PRACK,PUBLISH,UPDATE Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 [$sdpVer] IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port+0] TLS/RTP/SAVP 0 8 101 c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=sendrecv a=rtcp-mux a=setup:active a=connection:new a=fingerprint:SHA-1 C1:00:55:77:DC:B7:2B:D1:AB:8E:4C:E1:9F:04:C0:34:83:78:7C:E2 a=crypto:1 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:k8FuMlkO/O4uy4OnGiN5VIC3lxcc5MlmjuAcY0a7 UNENCRYPTED_SRTCP

ACK [$remoteContact] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[$localTransport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: [$localHdr] To:[$remoteHdr] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [$localCseq] ACK Contact: [$localContact] [routes] Max-Forwards: 70 Allow: INVITE,ACK,BYE,CANCEL,SUBSCRIBE,NOTIFY,MESSAGE,REFER,INFO,PRACK,PUBLISH,UPDATE Subject: Performance Test Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]

INVITE [$remoteContact] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[$localTransport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: [$localHdr] To:[$remoteHdr] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [$localCseq] INVITE Contact: [$localContact] Supported: 100rel [routes] Max-Forwards: 70 Subject: Performance Test Allow: INVITE,ACK,BYE,CANCEL,SUBSCRIBE,NOTIFY,MESSAGE,REFER,INFO,PRACK,PUBLISH,UPDATE Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
v=0 o=user1 53655765 [$sdpVer] IN IP[local_ip_type] [local_ip] s=- c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] t=0 0 m=audio [media_port+0] TLS/RTP/SAVP 0 8 101 c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] a=rtpmap:0 PCMU/8000 a=rtpmap:8 PCMA/8000 a=rtpmap:101 telephone-event/8000 a=sendrecv a=rtcp-mux a=setup:active a=connection:new a=fingerprint:SHA-1 C1:00:55:77:DC:B7:2B:D1:AB:8E:4C:E1:9F:04:C0:34:83:78:7C:E2 a=crypto:1 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:k8FuMlkO/O4uy4OnGiN5VIC3lxcc5MlmjuAcY0a7 UNENCRYPTED_SRTCP m=video 5030 TLS/RTP/SAVP 98 b=TIAS:512000 c=IN IP[media_ip_type] [media_ip] a=sendrecv a=rtcp-mux a=setup:active a=connection:new a=fingerprint:SHA-1 08:6D:F9:EF:6B:83:46:95:91:28:C1:AE:C3:40:29:69:B0:A6:B7:48 a=rtpmap:98 H264/90000 a=fmtp:98 profile-level-id=42401f;packetization-mode=0 a=rtcp-fb:* ccm fir a=rtcp-fb:* nack pli a=crypto:1 AES_CM_128_HMAC_SHA1_80 inline:k8FuMlkO/O4uy4OnGiN5VIC3lxcc5MlmjuAcY0a7 UNENCRYPTED_SRTCP

ACK [$remoteContact] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[$localTransport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: [$localHdr] To:[$remoteHdr] Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: [$localCseq] ACK Contact: [$localContact] [routes] Max-Forwards: 70 Allow: INVITE,ACK,BYE,CANCEL,SUBSCRIBE,NOTIFY,MESSAGE,REFER,INFO,PRACK,PUBLISH,UPDATE Subject: Performance Test Content-Type: application/sdp Content-Length: [len]
